chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 650 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.5945/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 27.11.2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate along with Applicant >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the complaint of the applicant is pending before the Health Care Commission and the applicant will pursue the same, hence under instructions, does not press this Application. In view of the above, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI/PS
